result:
Here are the authentication and session management files in this codebase:

## Middleware (Token Validation)

| File | Class | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| `app/Http/Middleware/OauthMiddleware.php` | `OauthMiddleware` | OAuth2 bearer token validation against `oauth2_access_tokens` table |
| `app/Http/Middleware/webMiddleware.php` | `webMiddleware` | JWT validation for web endpoints (Firebase JWT) |
| `app/Http/Middleware/webMiddlewareV2.php` | `webMiddlewareV2` | Enhanced JWT validation with entity ID checks, auto-injects userID |
| `app/Http/Middleware/MerchantMiddleware.php` | `MerchantMiddleware` | JWT validation for merchant endpoints |
| `app/Http/Middleware/thirdPartyToken.php` | `thirdPartyToken` | Access token validation for third-party integrations via `globalThirdPartyTokens` |
| `app/Http/Middleware/EcomMiddleware.php` | `EcomMiddleware` | Token validation for e-commerce customers via `globalEcomCustomerAccessTokens` |

## Controllers (Login / Token Issuance)

| File | Key Methods |
|------|-------------|
| `app/Http/Controllers/userController.php` | `loginCheck()`, `loginCheckQB()`, `refreshJWT()`, `jarvisLogin()` (720h JWT) |
| `app/Http/Controllers/oauthController.php` | `getOAuthToken()`, `checkDetails()`, `checkSerialNumber()`, `checkClientID()` |
| `app/Http/Controllers/basicAppController.php` | `generateOauthToken()`, `loginApp()`, `generateClient()`, `generateThirdPartyToken()` |

## Models (Session & Token Logic)

| File | Key Methods |
|------|-------------|
| `app/users.php` | `loginCheck()` — credential validation, generates `qbSessionID` via `md5(rand\|userID)` |
| `app/LicenseQB.php` | `generateOauthToken()` — core OAuth2 token generation, device/client validation, token activation/deactivation |

## Config

| File | Details |
|------|---------|
| `config/auth.php` | Eloquent driver, `App\User` model, `users` table |
| `config/session.php` | Redis-backed sessions, 120 min lifetime |
| `app/Http/routes.php` (lines 18-35) | OAuth2 server singleton — `ClientCredentials` + `RefreshToken` grants, 24h access token lifetime |

## Key Routes

- `POST /oauth/token` → `basicAppController@generateOauthToken`
- `POST /v1/merchant/login` → `userController@loginCheck` (JWT)
- `POST /v1/merchant/refreshJwt` → `userController@refreshJWT`
- `POST /v1/merchant/loginQB` → `userController@loginCheckQB`
- `POST /v1/partner/generateToken` → third-party token generation

## Token Storage Tables

- `oauth2_clients` / `oauth2_access_tokens` — OAuth2 device tokens
- `globalThirdPartyTokens` — third-party API tokens
- `globalEcomCustomerAccessTokens` — e-commerce customer tokens
- `globalDeviceFingerprint` — device session tracking

## Auth Model

Hybrid approach: **OAuth2** for device/API clients (24h tokens) + **JWT** (HS256, `JWT_KEY` env var) for web/merchant sessions (30 min standard, 720h for Jarvis). Sessions backed by **Redis**.
